---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the Payroll Engine
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you are proposing.

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve or what use case does it enable?

## Component
Which part of the Payroll Engine would be affected?

- [ ] Backend API
- [ ] Web Application
- [ ] Payroll Console
- [ ] Docker / Container Setup
- [ ] Regulations / Scripting
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision the feature working. Include API changes, configuration options, or UI changes if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, examples, or references here (e.g. links to similar implementations in other projects).
